mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_NM AS product_nm , COUNT(*) AS cnt , MIN(SM.SALES_DATE) AS first_date FROM sales_mst SM JOIN sales_dtl SD ON SD.SALES_ID = SM.SALES_ID JOIN product_mst P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = SD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE SM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND SM.STORE_ID = #{storeId} AND SM.SALES_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND P.PRODUCT_NM IS NOT NULL GROUP BY P.PRODUCT_NM
